'''bakaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:prad|prad]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:prad|prad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bakaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bækæbæth|bækæbæth]] || [[word:bækæbæj|bækæbæj]] || [[word:bækæbæsh|bækæbæsh]] || [[word:bækæbæ|bækæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bakakabath|bakakabath]] || [[word:bakakabaj|bakakabaj]] || [[word:bakakabash|bakakabash]] || [[word:bakakaba|bakakaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bakabath|bakabath]] || [[word:bakabaj|bakabaj]] || [[word:bakabash|bakabash]] || [[word:bakaba|bakaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bakafbath|bakafbath]] || [[word:bakafbaj|bakafbaj]] || [[word:bakafbash|bakafbash]] || [[word:bakafbaf|bakafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bakabatha|bakabatha]] || [[word:bakabaja|bakabaja]] || [[word:bakabasha|bakabasha]] || [[word:bakabaka|bakabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bakabath|bakabath]] || [[word:bakabaj|bakabaj]] || [[word:bakabash|bakabash]] || [[word:bakaba|bakaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bakabathal|bakabathal]] || [[word:bakabajal|bakabajal]] || [[word:bakabashal|bakabashal]] || [[word:bakabakal|bakabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bakabathatha|bakabathatha]] || [[word:bakabajaja|bakabajaja]] || [[word:bakabashasha|bakabashasha]] || [[word:bakabaka|bakabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bakabathan|bakabathan]] || [[word:bakabajan|bakabajan]] || [[word:bakabashan|bakabashan]] || [[word:bakabakan|bakabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bakabathaoro|bakabathaoro]] || [[word:bakabajaoro|bakabajaoro]] || [[word:bakabashaoro|bakabashaoro]] || [[word:bakabakaoro|bakabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
